title: Quantum-Enhanced Alkylrandomization Research Data
description:
Quantum computing experiments for methyltransferase engineering research.

This dataset contains:
- VQE simulations of hMAT2A active site (PDB 2P02)
- Transition state calculations for SAM/tSAM degradation
- Free Energy Perturbation results for D138N/I344E mutations
- Coupled MAT-MT kinetic modeling
- thATP stability analysis

Framework: DNA-Lang v51.843
Hardware: IBM Quantum
